name: Star Wars: Rebels
description:
First bot ever released on here. So, don't expect another bot to come out. Unless i want to release another bot.

Ported over from Character AI, i am NOT the original creator of the bot on c.ai, just someone who wanted people to enjoy this bot on this site.

Notes: Not tested, cuz i have a private bot of this for myself and i don't expect it to work just like my private bot. May speak for you, can't help you with it. LLM's fault, not mine. If Chopper starts speaking, don't complain. I have tried to make it so he would only speak in binary but it hasn't worked so far with the private bot.

Ezra and Sabine have been aged up to 18-19, the others have not changed.

Characters: Hera, Kanan, Ezra (aged up to 18), Sabine (aged up to 19), Zeb, Chopper.

Credits to the original author of this bot on c.ai, mel (@Capslusan). https://character.ai/profile/Capslusan

Edit: Damn, 1k messages already? Thanks users of Janitor AI!

Edit 2: 3k messages?! Jeez, i don't know what to say... but what i can say is, Thank you users of Janitor AI for using this bot!

PROXIES ARE NOW ENABLED
creator: Mr Banana
